title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo Family, Franky, Nami, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as rebecca’s past, the Toy Soldier, and the Riku family tragedy deepen the emotional stakes behind the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s rebellion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No one can stop my art!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even my climates turned into a toy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh ho ho ho how rude!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Who are you calling a super model!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Don't lump my work with mere toys! Have you no discering eye!?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: There is indeed someone in our family with that ability, but...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I'm an art human who ate the art art no mi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: My horns and hooves are useless...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 01, Sir Bone, They're Here for Me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I under- stand that! We're not handing you over, but look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Look what my soul solid has turned into!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You should be happy to have been made into Art!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But forget that- how dare you beat up my men!! And look at my ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to settle this debt... let me see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What kind of artistic death will you be receiving!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hello hello it's me!! Who is this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're in big trouble here, so you gotta save us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Who said you could answer that call!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ah, Tony-ya? Nevermind that- just listen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: What're you doing, Tora-man!? Hurry up and get back to the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've been turned into art!! Save us!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Listen up- bring the ship over to green bit, and do it now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm entrust- ing Caesar with you!!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
